ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupsource.C:
Registers sources (network interfaces) with the specified transit gateway multicast domain.

A multicast source is a network interface attached to a supported instance that sends multicast traffic. For information about supported instances, see [Multicast Considerations](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/vpc/latest/tgw/transit-gateway-limits.html

ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupsource.G.Description: The IP address assigned to the transit gateway multicast group.

ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupsource.N.Description: The group sources' network interface IDs to register with the transit gateway multicast group.

ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupsource.T.Description: The ID of the transit gateway multicast domain.
